title: Calgary Region Hydrogen Hub Opens to Create New Solutions in Global Low-Carbon Economy
content: The Calgary region is taking a major step towards securing its competitive future in the emerging low-carbon global economy with the launch of the Calgary Region Hydrogen Hub (CRH2). The Calgary Region Hydrogen Hubâ€™s initial membership includes Calgary Economic Development, the Transition Accelerator and Wheatland County, with over $3 million in funding from Alberta Innovates, Calgary Economic Development, the City of Calgary and Prairies Economic Development Canada.
author: Analysts Account
